html:
Exclusive to:

StructureItem

“Can be repaired using the inventory wall items.

Can be build up 4 levels.”

-for Structure

Scrap Wall is a type of Wall exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the From Beyond updates. It can be crafted with 4 Scraps, yielding 8 Scrap Walls items, and requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype. With 600 maximum, the Scrap Wall's health is between those of the Stone Wall and Thulecite Wall.

When built and placed, it will be at its third tier (phase 1). It can be upgraded into two more tiers with Scrap, needing 4 to fully upgrade. The full stage has 3 different designs, from which one will be chosen randomly. When hammered, the Scrap Wall will yield 1 Scrap, needing 10 strokes instead of the usual 3 strokes for the other walls.

Scrap Walls prevents the player's and Mobs' movement and can be used for decorative purposes.

Trivia

  • The Scrap Wall was introduced in the Scrappy Scavengers update.

Assets

  • Phase 3 90°
  • Phase 3 90°
  • Phase 3 90°
  • Phase 2 90°
  • Phase 1 90°
  • Half Destroyed 90°
  • Destroyed 90°

Gallery

  • Scrappy Wall concept art from Scrappy Scavengers Annonce from Rhymes with Play.
  • Scrappy Wall concept art from Scrappy Scavengers Annonce from Rhymes with Play.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tường Phế Liệu là một loại Tường độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật From Beyond. Nó có thể được chế tạo bằng 4 Phế liệu, tạo ra 8 vật phẩm Tường Phế liệu và yêu cầu Máy luyện kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Với mức tối đa 600, máu của Tường Phế Liệu nằm giữa Tường Đá và Tường Thulecite.
